name: cortexweave-marketplace
description: CortexWeave multi-agent pipeline plugin — 5-phase software delivery with automatic skill-based agent selection

plugins.name: cortexweave
plugins.description: 5-phase AI pipeline: discussion → planning → parallel implementation → QA → report. Spawns specialized sub-agents with automatic role selection from 33 skill inventory. Includes 3-agent review pipeline (implementer → spec-reviewer → code-quality-reviewer) per task.

skills.name: weave-plan
skills.description: Decompose brief into vertical-slice task list

skills.name: weave-skill
skills.description: Generate new role skill for the inventory
